Package microui.core.style

Class Stroke

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.Stroke
public final class Stroke extends Object
Represents a stroke style with color and weight properties for drawing outlines. Provides methods for applying stroke settings to both the main Processing context and PGraphics objects, with validation and default theme integration.

The Stroke class encapsulates all stroke-related drawing properties including color, weight (thickness), and stroke cap style (always SQUARE). It integrates with the Metrics system for resource tracking and supports copying from other Stroke objects.

Status: STABLE - Do not modify Last Reviewed: 27.10.2025

See Also:

  • Metrics

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Stroke()
    Constructs a Stroke with default theme color and weight.
    Stroke(float weight)
    Constructs a Stroke with specified weight and theme color.
    Stroke(AbstractColor color)
    Constructs a Stroke with specified color and default weight.
    Stroke(AbstractColor color, float weight)
    Constructs a Stroke with specified color and weight.

  • Constructor Details

    • Stroke

      public Stroke(AbstractColor color, float weight)
      Constructs a Stroke with specified color and weight.
      Parameters:
      color - the stroke color (cannot be null)
      weight - the stroke weight in pixels (must be greater than 0)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if color is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if weight is less than or equal to 0

    • Stroke

      public Stroke(AbstractColor color)
      Constructs a Stroke with specified color and default weight.
      Parameters:
      color - the stroke color (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if color is null

    • Stroke

      public Stroke(float weight)
      Constructs a Stroke with specified weight and theme color.
      Parameters:
      weight - the stroke weight in pixels (must be greater than 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if weight is less than or equal to 0

    • Stroke

      public Stroke()
      Constructs a Stroke with default theme color and weight.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public void apply()
      Applies this stroke style to the main Processing context. Sets stroke cap to SQUARE, applies the color, and sets the weight.

    • apply

      public void apply(processing.core.PGraphics pGraphics)
      Applies this stroke style to the specified PGraphics context.
      Parameters:
      pGraphics - the PGraphics context to apply the stroke to (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pGraphics is null

    • setWeight

      public void setWeight(float weight)
      Sets the stroke weight (thickness).
      Parameters:
      weight - the stroke weight in pixels (must be greater than 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if weight is less than or equal to 0

    • getWeight

      public float getWeight()
      Returns the current stroke weight.
      Returns:
      the stroke weight in pixels

    • set

      public void set(Stroke stroke)
      Copies stroke properties from another Stroke object.
      Parameters:
      stroke - the Stroke object to copy from (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if stroke is null

    • getColor

      public AbstractColor getColor()
      Returns the current stroke color.
      Returns:
      the stroke color

    • setColor

      public void setColor(AbstractColor color)
      Sets the stroke color.
      Parameters:
      color - the stroke color to set (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if color is null
